summary: This is an extremely brief post consisting of just a link to Joel's 'Back to Basics' article with the phrase 'Wax on, wax off' — a Karate Kid reference suggesting that mastering fundamentals requires repetitive practice. The post serves as nothing more than a pointer to the longer article.
key_points: Fundamentals matter and require disciplined practice
References the Karate Kid metaphor of building mastery through seemingly mundane repetition
key_insight: Mastering software development fundamentals requires the same disciplined, repetitive practice as any other craft.
